channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: UH Basketball Alum and Savoy owner hosts ‘Paint the Third Ward Red’ watch party for NCAA Championship
item.description: Co-owned by University of Houston women’s basketball alum Claire “Long” Watson and Black Watson, The Savoy is set to host a no entry fee watch party, inviting all University of Houston fans to wear their Coogs gear tonight for the ‘Paint the Third Ward Red’ watch party, celebrating the Cougars’ firs
item.dc:creator: Kendall Mayes, KPRC 2

item.title: Meghan McCain makes stance on trans athletes in women's sports clear after Andy Cohen spat
item.description: Meghan McCain wrote in a column last week that girls' and women's sports should be kept female and that the issue is really about "fairness.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Guerrero, Blue Jays agree to a $500 million, 14-year deal that starts in 2026, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Vladimir Guerrero Jr. and the Toronto Blue Jays agreed to a $500 million, 14-year contract that starts in 2026, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press, a deal that removes what would have been the biggest star from next offseason’s free-agent market.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Keyonte George scores career-high 35 in Jazz loss
item.description: ATLANTA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George set a new career high with 35 points, but it wasn't enough to stop the Utah Jazz' nine-game losing streak in a 147-135 loss to the Atlanta Hawks Sunday. The Jazz have lost 19 of 20 overall. Utah has given up at least 140 points in three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Doncic scores 30 points as Lakers dominate NBA-leading Thunder 126-99
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 30 points and the Los Angeles Lakers routed the league-leading Oklahoma City Thunder 126-99 on Sunday. Austin Reaves scored 20 points and LeBron James added 19 points and seven assists for the Lakers, who have won four of five.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mariners' Robles carted off field with shoulder injury after making dazzling catch against Giants
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Seattle Mariners outfielder Victor Robles injured his left shoulder and was carted off the field after making a dazzling catch in the ninth inning of a 5-4 loss to the San Francisco Giants on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hamlin takes the lead out of pits and holds off Byron in overtime to win at Darlington Raceway
item.description: DARLINGTON, S.C. (AP) — Denny Hamlin did his job so his pit crew could do its most stellar stop at the perfect time. Hamlin came into the pits after a final caution in third place and told himself to hit every mark, then let his guys take over.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alijah Martin's emphatic impact for Florida in this Final Four comes after 2023 heartbreaker at FAU
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Alijah Martin never really liked talking too much about his first Final Four experience because of the heartbreaking way it ended with Florida Atlantic two years ago.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A healthy Azzi Fudd stars as UConn wins women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — This time, Azzi Fudd was healthy. And she made a big difference for UConn. Fudd was named the Most Outstanding Player of the Final Four after leading the Huskies to the program's 12th national championship.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: After 149 wins over 6 seasons, J'Wan Roberts needs 1 more in last game for Houston's 1st NCAA title
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — J'Wan Roberts has been at Houston for six seasons and played in 149 wins for the Cougars. Win one more time in his final game Monday night against Florida, and the Cougars will be first-time national champions. “It feels great.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool loses and Southampton's relegation is sealed before a deadlocked Manchester derby
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Liverpool had a shock defeat on its march to the Premier League title — losing 3-2 at Fulham on Sunday. At the other end of the standings, Southampton became the first team to be relegated from England’s top flight this season after a 3-1 loss to Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Alex Ovechkin became the top goal-scorer in NHL history
item.description: Alex Ovechkin became the greatest goal scorer in NHL history because of a never-before-seen combination of a wicked shot, consistency over two decades and remarkable durability that kept him on the ice long enough to break Wayne Gretzky's record.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Geese make nest next to iconic Wrigley Field bleachers during Chicago Cubs games
item.description: The iconic Wrigley Field bleachers welcomed an unusual guest during the Chicago Cubs' series against the San Diego Padres this weekend.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: UConn is back on top of women’s basketball, winning its 12th national championship by routing defending champion South Carolina 82-59 on Sunday behind Azzi Fudd’s 24 points.
item.dc:creator: Dough Feinberg, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ovechkin passes Gretzky for NHL goals record at 895
item.description: Gretzky congratulated Ovechkin and his family for the accomplishment, adding, “They say records are made to be broken, but I’m not sure who’s going to get more goals than that.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Shedeur Sanders' throwing mechanics spark NFL debate ahead of draft
item.description: Former Colorado Buffaloes star Shedeur Sanders sparked a league-wide debate about his throwing technique of patting the football during his pro day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: The Cougars (35-4), who have never won a title, will play Florida on Monday night for the championship.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Carpenter and Torkelson homer as Tigers beat White Sox 7-2 and drop Chicago to 2-6
item.description: Kerry Carpenter homered for the third time in two games and Spencer Torkelson had a home run and a double Saturday as the Detroit Tigers beat the Chicago White Sox 7-2 for their fourth win in five games following an opening three-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Doug Bruno 'feels great,' but says stepping aside is the right call as Jill Pizzotti takes over at DePaul
item.description: CHICAGO – Less than a week after Hall of Fame head coach Doug Bruno stepped down for health reasons, the DePaul women’s basketball program named his successor—and it’s a familiar name to fans.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Utes ready to rock the Regionals
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah gymnastics team is the only program in the nation that has qualified for all 48 NCAA National Championship gymnastics meets.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC signs Escondido native Milan Iloski from FC Nordsjaelland
item.description: San Diego FC has acquired forward Milan Iloski on loan from its sister club, FC Nordsjaelland (FCN), the club announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Carlsbad native earns spot in WSL Challenger Series
item.description: Reid Van Wagoner, a 15-year-old surfer from Carlsbad, has secured a spot in the 2025 Challenger Series after winning a 10-point ride at Soup Bowl in Barbados.
item.dc:creator: Alysse Dodge, Fox 5

item.title: Carson Kelly becomes 1st Cubs player to hit for the cycle in 32 years in 18-3 rout of A's in West Sacramento
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Carson Kelly had come close to hitting for the cycle, yet that elusive triple kept holding him back. He had just two triples over a 10-year big league career before Monday night. That's when Kelly became the first Cubs player in 32 years to hit for the cycle.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz clinch worst record in franchise history
item.description: CHARLOTTE (ABC4 Sports) - It's official. The 2024-25 Utah Jazz will have the worst record in franchise history. Miles Bridges had 26 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Charlotte Hornets defeated the Jazz 110-106 on Monday night hand Utah is 60th loss of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
